---
title: "visual_explainer.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/skills/local/VisualExplainer/visual_explainer.py"
loc: 54
complexity: 7
logic_score: 2.88
style_score: 3.58
intel_score: 4.36
overall_score: 4.06
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating VisualExplainer, __init__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import VisualExplainer and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 16 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [datetime](file://datetime)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.sentinel._bootstrap](file://src.sentinel._bootstrap)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `VisualExplainer`
- `__init__`
- `generate_report`
